description: Documentation validation pass for {{repo}}. Checks README accuracy, ADR/decision coverage, broken links, and stale setup steps. File one bead per defect found. Recommended cadence: quarterly, run via 'bd mol pour docs-validation --var repo={{repo}}' (persistent, for audit trail).

steps.title: Docs validation: {{repo}}
steps.description: Umbrella for a documentation validation pass over {{repo}}. File one bead per defect found.

steps.title: README accuracy check: {{repo}}
steps.description: Verify README claims against reality: run every documented command, confirm described features exist, check screenshots/output are current. Output: list of inaccuracies.

steps.title: Stale setup-step check: {{repo}}
steps.description: Run the documented setup from a clean state (fresh venv/clone). Note any step that fails, is missing, or is out of order. Output: corrected setup sequence.

steps.title: Broken-link sweep: {{repo}}
steps.description: Scan all markdown for dead internal/external links and anchors. Tool: lychee or a markdown link checker. Output: list of broken links with source file.

steps.title: ADR / decision-coverage check: {{repo}}
steps.description: Cross-reference significant recent changes against docs/design ADRs. Flag decisions made in code/beads but never written down. Output: missing-ADR list.
